payload.title: Onboarding diagnostics when not set up for the dialect
payload.description: The reviewer hit cryptic `cannot find attribute 'strict'` and a missing `cargo trustc`. When stock cargo encounters `#![strict]`/named-arg syntax, or when `cargo trustc` isn't installed, surface a clear, actionable message ('this project uses the Trust dialect — install cargo-trustc and build with `cargo trustc build`, or run as an advisory linter with `trust check --rules bugs`') instead of a raw rustc error. Lowers the cliff for a first-time dialect user.
